full_text: Kalinchowk Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 6,84,750.00 units of IPO shares to the general public starting from 22nd - 25th Chaitra, 2082
Kalanga Hydro Limited is going to issue its 3,50,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 10th - 15th Chaitra, 2082

Kalanga Hydro Limited is going to issue its 14,00,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Far Western Province, Bajhang District, Kedarsyu VDC, Ward No. 04 & 05 (Including Former Banjh VDC, Ward No. 03), Bithadchir VDC, Ward No. 06 & 08 (Including Former Sunkunda VDC, Ward No. 03 & 05), Bungal Municipality, Ward No. 03,04,06,08 & 05 (Including Former Khiratadi VDC, Ward No. 09), Baitadi District, Dilasaini VDC, Ward No. 01 & 02/Darchula District, Sailyashikhar Municipality, Ward No. 01 and non- affected areas of all Wards of Bajhang District, Kedarsyu VDC,  Bithadchir VDC, Bungal Municipality, Baitadi District and Darchula District starting from 10th - 24th Chaitra, 2082
Sopan Pharmaceuticals Limited is going to issue its 4,29,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 9th - 12th Chaitra, 2082
Snow Rivers Limited is going to issue its 93,750.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 9th - 12th Chaitra, 2082

Snow Rivers Limited is going to issue its 9,37,500.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Taplejung District, Sirijanga VDC, Ward No. 08 (Locals), Ward No. 01 - 07 (Project Affected Areas), Sidingwa VDC, Ward No. 05 & 06, Pathibhara Yangwarak VDC, Ward No. 05 & 06 and Panchthar District, Hilihang VDC, Ward No. 01 (Locals) starting from 9th - 23rd Chaitra, 2082
Sanigad Hydro Limited is going to issue its 5,70,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 8th - 11th Chaitra, 2082

Sanigad Hydro Limited is going to issue its 28,50,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Far Western Province, Bajhang District, Bungal Municipality, Ward No. 04 (Former Khiratadi VDC Ward No. 08), Ward No. 02 (Former Dahabgar VDC Ward No. 06)/Ward No. 01 (Former Dahabgar VDC Ward No. 02) and Ward No. 03, 05 -11 starting from 8th - 22nd Chaitra, 2082

Yambaling Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 7,00,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Sindhupalchowk District, Jugal VDC, Ward No. 01 - 07 starting from 8th - 22nd Chaitra, 2082
Yambaling Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 2,10,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 8th - 11th Chaitra, 2082

Beni Hydropower Project Limited is going to issue its 10,40,000.00 units of IPO shares to the local residents, project affected and non-affected areas of Solukhumbu District, Solu Dudhkunda Municipality Ward No. 02, 03 & 04, 05, 06, 07 & 11 and rest of all other areas starting from 1st - 15th Chaitra, 2082
Beni Hydropower Project Limited is going to issue its 1,04,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 1st - 5th Chaitra, 2082

Taksar Pikhuwa Khola Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 12,00,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Bhojpur District starting from 27th Falgun - 11th Chaitra, 2082
Taksar Pikhuwa Khola Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 3,03,067.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 27th Falgun - 1st Chaitra, 2082
Shikhar Power Development Limited has extended the deadline for its 18,42,600.00 units of IPO shares to the general public until Falgun 26, 2082
Shikhar Power Development Limited is going to issue its 18,42,600.00 units of IPO shares to the general public starting from 17th - 22nd Falgun, 2082

Kalinchowk Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 5,50,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Dolakha District, Bigu VDC Ward No. 08/Kalinchowk VDC, Ward No. 01 & 02 starting from 13th - 27th Falgun, 2082
Kalinchowk Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 82,500.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 13th - 17th Falgun, 2082
Palpa Cement Industries Limited is going to issue its 45,00,000.00 units of IPO shares to the general public starting from 12th - 15th Falgun, 2082
Appolo Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 94,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 11th - 14th Falgun, 2082

Appolo Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 4,70,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Okhaldhunga District, Khijidemba VDC Ward No. 07 & 08, Solukhumbu District, Likhu Pike VDC, Ward No. 02 and Ramechhap District, Umakunda VDC, Ward No. 02 & 03 and Gokulganga VDC, Ward No. 01 Starting from 11th - 25th Falgun, 2082
